title: ranunculus latiangulus
intro: Ranunculus latiangulus, also known as the buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant contains a compound called ranunculin, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ranunculus latiangulus include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its healing properties.
